perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a yellow-dyed streak stands in a warehouse-style store, holding a large Lego box. Large text overlays and the Costco logo are visible. (2) The camera zooms in on the front of the Lego box, which depicts Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs' cottage. A hand enters the frame from the side to point at specific minifigures like the Seven Dwarfs. (3) The woman turns the box around to reveal the back, showing the interior details of the Lego set. The camera focuses on small vignettes on the back of the box: the dwarfs mining, the well, and the evil queen. (4) Detailed close-ups of the box's artwork show the 'light brick' feature and various rooms inside the cottage. The woman reacts with surprised and happy facial expressions. (5) The woman holds the full box again, looking directly at the camera while speaking enthusiastically, concluding the video in front of shelves of plush toys.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music plays in the background throughout the video. A high-pitched, excited female voice begins speaking immediately about the price of the item. (2) An energetic male voice joins in, interacting with the female speaker. They sound very enthusiastic, using many exclamations and 'wow' sounds. (3) The audio consists of continuous dialogue between the two, with the female voice remaining dominant. (4) Subtle ambient warehouse sounds like distant chatter and cart movements are occasionally audible under the music and main vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) COSTCO WHOLESALE - Functional text/Logo. (2) 太便宜不買可惜 (Too cheap, it's a pity not to buy) - Hook text. (3) 黑五好康 (Black Friday Great Deal) - Hook text. (4) 迪士尼超大白雪公主樂高 (Disney Super Large Snow White Lego) - Functional text. (5) 4699, 折了1200, 只要3500 (4699, discounted 1200, only 3500) - Price information. (6) Disney Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs - Functional text on the Lego box.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Inspection -> Price Discussion -> Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen; 1 male hand pointing at the box and male voice off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long dark hair featuring a prominent yellow/neon streak at the front. She is wearing a black top and a brownish-grey skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and large quantities of merchandise (plush toys and other Lego sets). Black Friday promotional signs are visible.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Detailed Review -> Price Value -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional review and deal-finding vlog. The creator aims to showcase the details and value of a high-end Lego Snow White set currently on sale at Costco during the Black Friday period, encouraging viewers to take advantage of the significant discount.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of the product, emphasis on the low price at a specific retailer (Costco), and positive recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between an on-screen host and an off-screen 'cameraman' figure.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing styles (large colorful text, fast cuts) to maintain high engagement.
